ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drop_items" (
  "drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drop item */,
  "m_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster that drops the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item dropped */,
  "drop_chance" INTEGER /* Chance of the item being dropped (as a percentage) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., Weapon, Armor, Consumable) */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level or quality of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Rare, Legendary) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's image */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the item's data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the item is currently active in the game */,
  "stack_size" INTEGER /* Maximum stack size of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drop_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each drop item
ID of the monster that drops the item
Chance of the item being dropped (as a percentage)
Type of item (e.g., Weapon, Armor, Consumable)
Level or quality of the item
Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Rare, Legendary)
Date when the item was added to the database
Date when the item's data was last updated
Flag to indicate if the item is currently active in the game
Maximum stack size of the item
